source.title: Standard for Day Surgery/Procedure Service
source.population: Patients receiving planned day surgery or procedure services in DoH-licensed facilities, with age, risk, procedure, anesthesia, and discharge qualifications.
source.setting: DoH-licensed day surgery and procedure facilities in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: UAE-direct for service governance, assessment, care plans, pre/intra/post-procedure documentation, records, discharge, and patient education. It does not replace anesthesiologist judgment, facility policy, consent, credentialing, or emergency care.

exact_location.heading: Patient assessment and individualized care plan

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.

items.rationale: The exact DoH section supports documenting an individualized clinician-entered perioperative care plan after assessment; it does not generate or revise the plan.

items.final_wording: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

source.title: Statement on Documentation of Anesthesia Care
source.population: Patients receiving anesthesia services across preanesthesia, intraoperative, and postanesthesia phases.
source.setting: Anesthesia care continuum and anesthesia medical records.
source.exclusions: Exact for documentation fields and continuity of anesthesia records. It supports recording clinician-assessed facts and completed plans, not generating management, medicines, doses, procedures, referrals, discharge, or urgency.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

items.rationale: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Anesthesia plan documentation-only review; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
